paper_title: StarCoder: may the source be with you!

extraction_data.parameters: Base: 15B, Base-Small: 1B, Base-Medium: 3B, Small: 90M, Medium: 350M, Large: 1.3B, X-Large: 6.7B, XX-Large: 15.5B
extraction_data.innovation: The paper introduces two new large language models, Starcoder and Starcoder base, trained on a massive dataset of 1 trillion tokens sourced from The Stack. The models demonstrate exceptional code generation capabilities, outperforming existing open-source and commercial models.
extraction_data.extension: a general-purpose, open-source, transformer-based model that can read and redact code
